items.statcast_observation: Bobby Witt Jr. produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 113.3 mph at a 14.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals lost to the Boston Red Sox, KC 3, BOS 4. Michael Wacha led the night, working 6.0 innings with 1 earned runs, 8 strikeouts and 2 walks. Bobby Witt Jr. supplied the loudest Royals contact at 113.3 mph.
items.title: Royals vs Red Sox Recap
